latestReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
#### Features
* Shows Finalising your report, please give it some time by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/217

#### Improvements
* Allow sitemap.txt and validate contents in crawlSitemap by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/703
* catch requestHandler errors in sitemapCrawl so unreachable pages appear in pagesNotScanned by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/704

#### Bug Fixes
* fix: resolve npm audit vulnerabilities via dependency overrides by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/222
* fix: sanitize S3 metadata values before upload by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/696
* Prevent summary page table from breaking due to serialization issues by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/697
* fix: prevent crash when page closes during custom flow scan by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/698
* Pass browser and userDataDir into runCustom and use launchPersistentContext by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/699
* N/A page counts in scan report when pagesScanned contains null pageTitle by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/705
* Fix chaining of empty categories when generating report by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/706
* Add env to enable audio for playwright by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/709
* Add SVG icons and CSS adjustments for collapsed overlay menu by @khhui in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/708
* fix: correct ALL_PROXY scheme handling and warn on INCLUDE_PROXY with PAC-only proxy by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/711
* Bump flatted from 3.2.9 to 3.4.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/208
* Bump picomatch from 2.3.1 to 2.3.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/209
* Bump node-forge from 1.3.3 to 1.4.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/210
* Bump @xmldom/xmldom from 0.8.11 to 0.8.12 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/212
* Bump electron from 38.2.0 to 39.8.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/214
* Bump lodash from 4.17.23 to 4.18.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/215
* Bump brace-expansion from 1.1.12 to 1.1.13 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/216
* Bump axios from 1.13.5 to 1.15.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/218
* Bump follow-redirects from 1.15.11 to 1.16.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/219
* Bump jsonpath from 1.2.1 to 1.3.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/221
* chore: bump version to v0.10.86 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/220
* Bump picomatch from 2.3.1 to 2.3.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/693
* Bump brace-expansion from 5.0.4 to 5.0.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/694
* Bump lodash from 4.17.23 to 4.18.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/700
* Bump fast-xml-parser from 5.5.6 to 5.5.11 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/701
* Bump axios from 1.13.6 to 1.15.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/702
* Bump follow-redirects from 1.15.11 to 1.16.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/707
* chore: bump version to v0.10.86 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/712

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.83...0.10.86
latestPreReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
#### Features
* New Oobee report and Custom flow that simplifies accessibility concepts with improved user experience @Carlintyj @WilsonkwSheng @thehansong @Sachin-Gamage in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/603
* Remove prompt for custom flow label in desktop app by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/182

#### Improvements
* Reduce time taken by 10 seconds on first run in Docker by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/599
* Updated dependencies https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/596 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/594 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/600 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/581 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/608 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/609 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/178 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/180 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/181 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/183 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/184 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/185 https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/186

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.70...0.10.72
